days.summary: Google DeepMind released Gemma 4, a new family of open multimodal models with up to 256K context and variants including 26B A4B and 31B, strengthening Google’s position in open-weight AI for reasoning and agentic workloads. ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0 and previewed Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview, signaling continued competition from Chinese frontier model labs. OpenAI also acquired tech talk show TBPN, a small but notable strategic media move as leading AI companies expand influence beyond core model products.
